import React from 'react'; import { useLocation, useNavigate, Link } from 'react-router-dom'; const Success = () => { const location = useLocation(); const navigate = useNavigate(); const orderData = location.state || {}; // NO DATA STORAGE - Ads only exist in memory during session // When browser closes or page refreshes - ads are GONE if (!orderData.squareNumber) { return (

Order Complete! 🎉

Your advertising campaign has been successfully set up.

Return to Home
); } return (
✅

Congratulations! 🎉

Your advertising campaign is now live for this browser session!
🔒 No data is stored - ad will disappear when you close the browser

Session Details

Business Name: {orderData.businessName}
Advertising Square: #{orderData.squareNumber} (Page {orderData.pageNumber})
Campaign Duration: This browser session only
Total Paid: £{orderData.finalAmount || 0}.00

Session-Based Advertising

  • ✅ Your ad is live immediately
  • 🔄 Refresh the page to see your ad
  • 🚫 Ad disappears when browser closes
  • 🔒 No personal data stored
  • 💚 Privacy-first approach
); }; export default Success;
